description: An origin match alone is not sufficient: two concurrent mounts of the same pack share an isolation_origin, so the host page's listener MUST additionally verify event.source equals the exact contentWindow captured for that mount_id at construction time -- a message whose origin matches but whose source is the OTHER mount's window MUST be discarded exactly as an origin mismatch is.

expected.reason: event.source (window-ref-B) does not match the contentWindow captured for mount_id 01J8Z3K4N5P6Q7R8S9T0V1W2ZA (window-ref-A)
